category_sources: source_facts.description says it discovers unused Kubernetes resources; official GitHub README describes Kor as a Kubernetes orphaned resources finder.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses "Kor - Kubernetes Orphaned Resources Finder"; source_facts.name is kor.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface found for usage, installation, flags, and supported resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/yonahd/kor; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a CLI for finding unused Kubernetes resources.
